PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?conference ?conferenceLabel WHERE {
  ?team wdt:P31 wd:Q454654 ; wdt:P571 ?inception .
  FILTER(YEAR(?inception) = 1889)
  ?team p:P471 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P471 ?conference ; pq:P580 ?start .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?statement pq:P582 ?end
  }
  .
  FILTER(YEAR(?start) <= 1988)
  FILTER(YEAR(?end) >= 1988 || ! BOUND(?end))
  ?conference wdt:P361 wd:Q22829196 ; wdt:P1340 wd:Q25790659 .
  ?conference rdfs:label ?conferenceLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?conferenceLabel) = "en")
}
